decision-tree.root-question: What is VRAM budget relative to base-model size?

branch.conclusion: Use QLoRA (4-bit base + LoRA adapter). r=16, alpha=32, target_modules=ALL linear.

branch.question: Is the task signal subtle (style/tone/brand voice) needing magnitude+direction decomposition?

branch.conclusion: Use DoRA. ~10% slower but better on subtle tasks.
Use rsLoRA. Rank-stabilised scaling for high-rank adapters.
Use vanilla LoRA. r=16, alpha=32, lr=2e-4.

example.p: Mistral-7B fp16 14GB, single A6000 48GB → 48>=1.5*14 → vanilla LoRA branch; r=16 → conclusion r1-target-all-linear.
